hook: A good close is clear, proportionate, and free of covert bargaining.
body: The end of the date should reduce ambiguity without pushing for emotional certainty on the spot.

hook: Men sometimes turn the goodbye into a verdict moment because they want instant relief from uncertainty.
body: Clarity beats pressure: show interest, make the next step legible, and leave room for her response.

hook: Clarity beats pressure: show interest, make the next step legible, and leave room for her response.
body: Saying you had a good time and would like to see her again is cleaner than fishing for reassurance in real time.

body: Close with one warm sentence and one clear intention, then let the next answer arrive naturally.
